title: Bundle sweep 49: mixed-engine total=6 same=1 forward-hash
methodology: Changed the instruction bundler to flush after 6 total ops and 1 ops on one engine, with mixed-engine bundles. Kept the original hash stage order.
motivation: Brief insight: ## Research Brief: Anthropic Performance Takehome (perf-takehome). Building on exp-001-baseline-unoptimized by changing bundle packing policy.
